name: @dhruv2mars/copilotchat
description: GitHub Copilot chat app in your terminal

scripts.check: node --check bin/copilotchat.js && node --check bin/copilotchat-lib.js && node --check bin/install.js && node --check bin/install-lib.js && node --check scripts/test.js
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --all --include bin/copilotchat-lib.js --include bin/install-lib.js --reporter text-summary node scripts/test.js
